title: Baton Design Fidelity Config
description: Project-level design system declaration for Rule 9 conformance auditing.

ui_bearing.description: True if this project has a UI surface. False or absent = design conformance audit is skipped.

design_system.description: Design system declaration. Required when ui_bearing is true.

token_source.description: Path to design token file (JSON) containing colour, spacing, typography tokens

component_library.description: Path to shared component library directory
